/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/my_opengl_project.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/my_opengl_project.dir/main.cpp.o -o my_opengl_project  /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglfw3.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglad.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglm.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
